overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne depicting a hunter character traversing a foggy winter forest path, ascending stone stairs to a moonlit terrace, and entering a dark gothic interior. The atmosphere shifts from misty woodland with warm lantern glow to an open balcony under a massive full moon, then into pitch-black corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest path with stone walls and lanterns

events.description: gothic manor building becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding forest path toward the distant manor

entered.detail: tall bare winter trees lining the left side of the path
low stone wall covered in snow and moss
low stone wall with overhanging vegetation
lantern emitting warm orange light attached to the wall
narrow dirt trail with patches of snow and frost
large dark gothic structure visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The hunter walks through a narrow, foggy forest path flanked by stone walls and tall bare trees. Warm lanterns provide the only light against the blue mist as the character approaches a distant gothic manor visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to gothic manor gate

events.description: exits dense forest into open area at the base of the manor stairs
begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the iron gate

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the gated entrance with the moon visible ahead

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading up to the manor entrance
ornate iron gate with stone pillars framing the entrance
massive bright full moon visible through the archway
tall decorative stone pillars flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a grand stone staircase ascending toward a gothic manor. The character climbs the stairs as the massive full moon becomes visible through the iron gate archway ahead, transitioning from the enclosed forest to the open approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with panoramic moon and city view

events.description: emerges through the gate onto the open terrace under the full moon
turns left to walk along the terrace edge overlooking the city

agents.ego_description: walking along the moonlit terrace, surveying the distant foggy cityscape

entered.detail: wide stone-paved terrace with cracks and overgrown weeds
decorative stone balustrade along the terrace edge
vast cityscape with countless lights visible in the fog below
large ornamental urn on a pedestal
tall ornate iron street lamp with multiple lanterns

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open terrace, the hunter walks beneath a massive full moon dominating the night sky. The camera pans to reveal a breathtaking view of a distant foggy cityscape below, with ornate stone railings and decorative urns lining the terrace edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior corridor and wooden staircase

events.description: enters the dark archway, visibility drops to near darkness
begins descending wooden stairs into the lower interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the pitch-black corridor and descending into the manor's dimly lit interior

entered.detail: stone archway leading into the dark interior of the building
steep wooden staircase descending into darkness
single lantern providing dim orange light on the wall
dark wooden panel walls of the interior corridor

segments.scene_description: The hunter enters a dark archway, leaving the moonlight behind for near-total darkness. Visibility drops dramatically as the character navigates through a pitch-black corridor and begins descending a creaky wooden staircase, guided only by a single wall-mounted lantern.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, misty forest into a vast moonlit expanse before plunging into a suffocating gothic interior. It begins with the hunter traversing a narrow path flanked by stone walls and bare trees, where warm lanterns pierce through a dense blue fog toward a distant manor. As the path opens, the camera ascends a grand stone staircase, transitioning from the enclosed woodland to an open approach framed by an iron gate archway. The scene then expands onto a wide terrace dominated by a massive full moon, revealing a breathtaking view of a foggy cityscape beyond ornate railings and decorative urns. Finally, the hunter passes through a dark archway, leaving the moonlight behind as the environment shifts into a pitch-black corridor and a creaky wooden staircase lit only by a single wall lantern.
